html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

The Brightshade Husk is a resource exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It can only be obtained by killing Deadly Brightshades.

Brightshade Husks can be used alongside Pure Brilliance to craft tools, armor, and weaponry at a Brightsmithy.

Trivia

  • Brightshade Husks were introduced in the Taking Root update.

Exclusive to:

“It's incredibly tough. I could use this!”
–Wilson
“Can I burn it now?”
–Willow
“Ah. Is not haunted anymore.”
–Wolfgang
“It can't hurt anyone anymore.”
–Wendy
“IT WAS OF NO USE TO ME ALIVE”
–WX-78
“An extremely resilient material. I should make use of it.”
–Wickerbottom
“That could be good for somethin'.”
–Woodie
“The blasted thing is finally dead.”
–Maxwell
“It hath a formidible hide, for a non-meat.”
–Wigfrid
“That was one mean plant. We're glad it's gone!”
–Webber
“Ah, raw ingredients!”
–Warly
“Sorry”
–Wormwood
“That's tough stuff!”
–Winona
“Unoccupied.”
–Wortox
“Hee-hee, it dead!”
–Wurt
“If you kill a ghost plant, do you get... a double ghost?”
–Walter
“What an interesting material, I should make use of it.”
–Wanda
The Brightshade Husk is a resource exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It can only be obtained by killing Deadly Brightshades.
Brightshade Husks can be used alongside Pure Brilliance to craft tools, armor, and weaponry at a Brightsmithy.

The '''Brightshade Husk''' is a resource exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[From Beyond]]''. It can only be obtained by killing [[Deadly Brightshade]]s. 

Brightshade Husks can be used alongside [[Pure Brilliance]] to craft tools, armor, and weaponry at a [[Brightsmithy]].
